name: Auto Sync Upstream & Workflow Mod

on:
  schedule:
    # 每天北京时间早上 04:30 自动运行（UTC 20:30）
    - cron: '30 20 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch: # 保留手动触发按钮

permissions:
  contents: write
  workflows: write

jobs:
  sync_and_modify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    name: Automated Sync and Strict Workflow Trimming

    steps:
    - name: Checkout target repo with PAT
      uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        ref: main
        token: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
        persist-credentials: true
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Configure git identity
      run: |
        git config --global user.name "github-actions[bot]"
        git config --global user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

    - name: Fetch and Merge Upstream
      run: |
        # 请根据你的上游仓库 URL 调整下面的 remote
        git remote add upstream https://github.com/VIKINGYFY/OpenWRT-CI.git || true
        git fetch upstream main || true
        # 合并上游 main（若无变更会返回 non-zero，我们容错处理）
        git merge upstream/main --allow-unrelated-histories -m "🔄 Auto Sync: Fetch latest upstream" || echo "No remote changes to merge"

    - name: Install yq for safe YAML edits (fallbacks included)
      run: |
        # 安装 mikefarah 的 yq（用于安全修改 workflow YAML）
        YQ=/usr/local/bin/yq
        if ! command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          sudo wget -q -O $YQ https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/latest/download/yq_linux_amd64
          sudo chmod +x $YQ
        fi
        yq --version

    - name: Force Modify Downloaded Workflows (use yq where possible)
      run: |
        set -euo pipefail

        # 1) 禁用 MTK-ALL.yml 的 workflow_run 触发（用 yq 删除触发器键）
        if [ -f ".github/workflows/MTK-ALL.yml" ]; then
          if command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            yq eval 'del(.on.workflow_run)' -i .github/workflows/MTK-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🚫 Disabled on.workflow_run via yq for MTK-ALL.yml"
          else
            # 最小改变：只删除单行包含 workflow_run 的触发器定义（更安全的 sed）
            sed -i '/^on:/,/^jobs:/ {/^  workflow_run:/d}' .github/workflows/MTK-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🚫 Disabled on.workflow_run via sed fallback for MTK-ALL.yml"
          fi
        fi

        # 2) 精简 OWRT-ALL.yml 矩阵，只保留 X86 编译（用 yq 修改 matrix.CONFIG）
        if [ -f ".github/workflows/OWRT-ALL.yml" ]; then
          if command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            # 将所有 job 中存在的策略矩阵 CONFIG 设置为仅 X86（如果不存在则不报错）
            yq eval '(.jobs[]?.strategy?.matrix?.CONFIG) = ["X86"]' -i .github/workflows/OWRT-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🎯 Constrained OWRT-ALL.yml matrix to X86 only via yq"
          else
            sed -i 's/CONFIG: \[.*\]/CONFIG: [X86]/g' .github/workflows/OWRT-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🎯 Constrained OWRT-ALL.yml matrix to X86 only via sed fallback"
          fi
        fi

        # 3) 精简 QCA-ALL.yml 矩阵，只保留 IPQ60XX-WIFI-NO
        if [ -f ".github/workflows/QCA-ALL.yml" ]; then
          if command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            yq eval '(.jobs[]?.strategy?.matrix?.CONFIG) = ["IPQ60XX-WIFI-NO"]' -i .github/workflows/QCA-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🎯 Constrained QCA-ALL.yml matrix to IPQ60XX-WIFI-NO only via yq"
          else
            sed -i 's/CONFIG: \[.*\]/CONFIG: [IPQ60XX-WIFI-NO]/g' .github/workflows/QCA-ALL.yml || true
            echo "🎯 Constrained QCA-ALL.yml matrix to IPQ60XX-WIFI-NO only via sed fallback"
          fi
        fi

        # 4) 修改 Config/GENERAL.txt，确保开启 timecontrol（=y）
        if [ -f "Config/GENERAL.txt" ]; then
          if grep -q "^CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol" Config/GENERAL.txt; then
            sed -i 's/^CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol.*/CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol=y/' Config/GENERAL.txt
            echo "📝 Set CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol=y in Config/GENERAL.txt"
          else
            echo "CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol=y" >> Config/GENERAL.txt
            echo "📝 Appended CONFIG_PACKAGE_luci-app-timecontrol=y to Config/GENERAL.txt"
          fi
        fi

    - name: Validate YAMLs (syntax check)
      run: |
        # 用 yq 快速校验 workflow 的基本语法（如果 yq 可用）
        if command -v yq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          for f in .github/workflows/*.yml .github/workflows/*.yaml; do
            [ -f "$f" ] || continue
            echo "--- validate $f"
            yq eval '.' "$f" >/dev/null
          done
          echo "✅ YAML basic validation passed"
        else
          echo "⚠️ yq not available for validation (should be installed earlier)"
        fi

    - name: Push Synced & Modified Changes
      env:
        GIT_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
      run: |
        set -euo pipefail
        if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
          echo "✨ Changes detected, preparing to push..."
          git add -A
          git commit -m "⚙️ Auto Sync: Workflows trimmed and configs adjusted via automation" || echo "No commit (maybe nothing staged)"
          # 用 PAT 推送（actions/checkout 已把凭据写入）
          git push origin main
          echo "✅ Pushed changes to origin/main"
        else
          echo "🛑 No changes to push."
        fi
